name: Chicken Merge 2
author: Poki
description: Chicken Merge 2 is a merge-meets-tower-defense game where your feathered army stands between your base and endless waves of enemies! Train, upgrade, and merge your chickens to create powerful defenders, then position them strategically on the battlefield. The stronger your flock, the better weapons and upgrades you’ll unlock! Can your ultimate chicken squad hold the line? How to play Chicken Merge 2? Click or tap to select the chicken. Hold to merge them. Who created Chicken Merge 2? Chicken Merge 2 is created by Beedo Games. Play their other games on Poki: Base Defense , Base Defense 2 , Blocky Snakes , Call of Tanks , Chicken Merge , Circuit Master , Clash Of Armour , Clash of Skulls , Clash of Tanks , dark-boy, Idle Cowshed , Idle Gold Miner , Jelly Sokoban , Mafia Wars , Pirate Defense , Pirates Merger , Pizza Tower , Eggy Car , Swingers and Tanko.io ! How can I play Chicken Merge 2 for free? You can play Chicken Merge 2 for free on Poki. Can I play Chicken Merge 2 on mobile devices and desktop? Chicken Merge 2 can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
